must_fix.change_summary: Added 'Direct exec() Call Sites Bypassing tmux.ts' subsection to Affected Code -- documented codex.ts (lines 102, 104, 139, 170) and claude-session.ts (line 783) direct execAsync() calls that bypass tmux.ts helpers

Added unit test requirements for terminal/route.ts and capture/route.ts to Recommended Direction with 4 specific test cases (valid cliToolId, invalid cliToolId returns 400, non-existent worktreeId returns 404, valid inputs use CLIToolManager)

should_fix.change_summary: Added note about tmux.test.ts mock target migration from child_process.exec to child_process.execFile after tmux.ts migration, with error handling equivalence verification
Added recommendation to replace codex.ts direct exec() calls with tmux.ts safe wrappers (sendSpecialKey/sendSpecialKeys) and claude-session.ts:783 similarly, with specific mapping for each call site

Added session name injection prevention test requirements for tmux.test.ts -- shell metacharacters in sessionName for hasSession/createSession/sendKeys, verifying execFile argument arrays prevent shell interpretation

Added 'getSessionName() Pattern Inconsistency' subsection with comparison table of 4 implementations (cli-session.ts safe vs claude-session.ts/terminal/capture unsafe) and unification recommendation via CLIToolManager
Added backward compatibility note for session auto-creation restriction -- clear error message guidance, external script/CLI consideration, Terminal.tsx uses separate WebSocket path

nice_to_have.change_summary: Added reference implementation note for opencode.ts:113-117 execFileAsync pattern to Recommended Direction

nice_to_have.reason: isValidWorktreeId() shared utility extraction is an implementation detail better addressed during development rather than in the Issue specification
